description_zh: Estée Lauder（雅诗兰黛）是全球知名的顶级化妆品品牌，由雅诗·兰黛夫人于1946年在美国纽约创立。品牌以高品质的护肤品和经典香水闻名于世，最初从四款核心护肤产品起步，凭借创始人非凡的商业天赋和对美的执着追求，逐步成长为全球高端美妆领域的标杆。雅诗兰黛夫人提出的"接触销售"理念——即让顾客亲自试用产品——彻底改变了美妆零售方式。如今，雅诗兰黛集团已发展为涵盖护肤、彩妆、香水及护发产品的综合性美妆帝国，旗下拥有Estée Lauder、Clinique、MAC、Bobbi Brown、La Mer、Origins、Tom Ford Beauty等众多知名品牌。雅诗兰黛品牌本身以其Advanced Night Repair系列精华（小棕瓶）和Pure Color口红系列等标志性产品赢得了全球消费者的青睐。集团总部位于纽约，业务遍及全球150多个国家和地区，始终将科研创新作为品牌发展的核心驱动力，在抗衰老技术、皮肤修复等领域拥有世界领先的研发能力。

languages.en: Estée Lauder is a premier American cosmetics brand founded in 1946 by Estée Lauder in New York City. Starting with just four skincare products, the brand revolutionized beauty retail with its pioneering 'try-before-you-buy' approach. Estée Lauder has become synonymous with luxury skincare, makeup, and fragrances worldwide. Its iconic Advanced Night Repair serum (also known as 'Little Brown Bottle') is one of the best-selling skincare products globally. The Estée Lauder Companies now own a portfolio of prestigious brands including Clinique, MAC, Bobbi Brown, La Mer, and Tom Ford Beauty. Operating in over 150 countries, the company is renowned for its cutting-edge anti-aging research and dermatological innovation, making it one of the most influential beauty conglomerates in the world.
